Registry / Terms / volume conversion device

volume conversion device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02054 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.

Publication instances

1 distinct definitions across 2 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
device which automatically converts the volume measured at metering conditions into a volume at base conditions or into a mass by taking into account the gas characteristics (i.e. pressure, temperature, composition, density) measured using associated measuring instruments or stored in a memory
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency

202X2007OIML R 140:2007T.1.12.102054pending
